outputData.text: The robot currently has only a fixed base frame.

-------------------- Robot: (1 bodies)
Idx Body Name Joint Name Joint Type Parent Name(Idx) Children Name(s) --- --------- ---------- ---------- ---------------- ---------------- 1 link1 joint1 revolute base(0) --------------------

Idx Body Name Joint Name Joint Type Parent Name(Idx) Children Name(s) --- --------- ---------- ---------- ---------------- ---------------- 1 link1 joint1 revolute base(0) link2(2) 2 link2 joint2 revolute link1(1) --------------------

Joint 1: 0.0000 rad (0.0 deg) Joint 2: 0.0000 rad (0.0 deg)

End-effector position (FK): x=0.502, y=0.134, z=0.000 m
Note: L1 == L2, so the robot can reach the base origin.

Max distance from base: 0.4661 m (outer boundary: 0.60 m) —

Position error: 0.000000 m (should be near zero)
